title: WeatherDisplay
description: Displays the current weather status in your hud.
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b4dc2c0695e46f7bb779c6e27dbf2ed15e8b432_0.webp) **WeatherDisplay - Stay Informed Without Leaving Your (underground)Base!** WeatherDisplay is a simple yet essential mod that keeps you updated on the weather directly in your HUD. Designed for players like me who live underground, in enclosed bases, or just don’t want to step outside to check if it’s raining, this mod ensures you always know the conditions above ground, without ever leaving your safe haven. Whether you're waiting for clear skies or need to time your activities perfectly, WeatherDisplay has you covered!   **Options** * The displayed weather icon/text can be relocated using key: O * The displayed weather: clear, can be disabled (only wet weather) via a assigned key * The displayer can be hidden from the hud via a assigned key * The displayed weather icon can be switched to text using key: I * The displayed weather text colour can be changed using key: Y
Requirements This mod requires fabric api
